name: dout.dev
description: The DoUtDev Blog - Static site generator with custom CMS and template engine
author: Emiliano "Pixu" Pisu

scripts.test: node --test scripts/template-engine/tests/core.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/directives.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/filters.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/inheritance.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/expression-parser.test.js scripts/cms/tests/post-processor.test.js scripts/cms/tests/index.test.js scripts/cms/tests/config.test.js scripts/cms/tests/clean.test.js scripts/cms/tests/scan.test.js scripts/cms/tests/validate.test.js scripts/cms/tests/watch.test.js scripts/cms/tests/build.test.js scripts/linting/tests/format-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/format-check-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-a11y.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-links.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-structure.test.js src/scripts/pix-highlighter/pix-highlighter.test.js scripts/cms/tests/page-generator.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/renderer.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude='**/*.test.js' scripts/template-engine/tests/core.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/directives.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/filters.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/inheritance.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/expression-parser.test.js scripts/cms/tests/post-processor.test.js scripts/cms/tests/index.test.js scripts/cms/tests/config.test.js scripts/cms/tests/clean.test.js scripts/cms/tests/scan.test.js scripts/cms/tests/validate.test.js scripts/cms/tests/watch.test.js scripts/cms/tests/build.test.js scripts/linting/tests/format-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/format-check-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-a11y.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-links.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-structure.test.js src/scripts/pix-highlighter/pix-highlighter.test.js scripts/cms/tests/page-generator.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/renderer.test.js
scripts.test:watch: node --test --watch scripts/template-engine/tests/core.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/directives.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/filters.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/inheritance.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/expression-parser.test.js scripts/cms/tests/post-processor.test.js scripts/cms/tests/index.test.js scripts/cms/tests/config.test.js scripts/cms/tests/clean.test.js scripts/cms/tests/scan.test.js scripts/cms/tests/validate.test.js scripts/cms/tests/watch.test.js scripts/cms/tests/build.test.js scripts/linting/tests/format-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/format-check-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-html.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-a11y.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-links.test.js scripts/linting/tests/validate-structure.test.js src/scripts/pix-highlighter/pix-highlighter.test.js scripts/cms/tests/page-generator.test.js scripts/template-engine/tests/renderer.test.js
scripts.validate:all: pnpm validate:html && pnpm validate:structure && pnpm validate:links && pnpm validate:a11y
scripts.quality:check: pnpm test && pnpm format:check && pnpm format:check:html && pnpm validate:all
scripts.dev:cms: pnpm cms:clean && pnpm cms:build && pnpm cms:watch
scripts.build: pnpm cms:clean && pnpm cms:build && pnpm build:assets && vite build
